message:
chore: extract convoy issue tracking into convoy_issues.go (#1675)

Move trackedStatus, extractIssueID, getTrackedIssueStatus, and
refreshTrackedStatus from convoy.go to convoy_issues.go. No logic changes.

Resolves merge conflict with #1671 (constants dedup) by using the
updated constants.BdSubprocessTimeout reference.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/1675

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
